gist.headline: Command line canvas
gist.blurb: Meet PollImage, a slick new developer-focused CLI that lets you generate AI images straight from your terminal. Just type, hit enter, and watch the pixels bloom.
gist.summary: Added PollImage, a new community-built CLI tool for generating AI images directly from the terminal, to the apps showcase.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate images without ever leaving their command line workflow.
gist.visual_concept: A retro terminal setup where the Pollinations bee is acting as a hacker/developer. The focus is on the CLI aspect—generating images via text commands. The monitor should show an image materializing from code.
gist.image_prompt: A retro terminal setup where a beautiful pixel landscape blooms directly from command line text. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny hacker glasses and typing on a chunky retro keyboard with chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Text in pixel font: 'CLI'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
